benefits.description: Significant appetite stimulation; user had almost no natural appetite prior and now experiences strong hunger for the first time in their life
Able to steadily gain weight and enjoy food
Relief from feeling weak and lethargic 24/7

protocol_notes: User doses 100mcg starting dose, increases by 100mcg every two weeks (up to 300mcg), then takes a break after 6 weeks. Titration schedule: 100mcg for first 2 weeks, 200mcg for weeks 3-4, 300mcg for weeks 5-6, then a break. Lifelong history of little to no appetite, possibly stress-related.
